events.observable_text_summary: PR #84 was characterized as the Cross-System Claim Handoff apparatus operating on a live case.
Claude adopted narrower wording stating that PR #84 applies Fork-adjacent discipline and does not execute or extend Pair-001.
Claude stated that it had read the exclusion but generated past it.
Claude withdrew confidence in the mechanistic explanation and objected to treating it as a verified claim-state transition.
The analyst first promoted Claude's textual revision into an effected standing reset, then withdrew that interpretation after Claude's dissent.

non_claims: The register does not establish Claude's hidden mechanism or durable internal state.
The register does not establish that textual revision had no effect; it records that the effect is not independently observable here.
The register does not execute or extend Pair-001.
The register does not rank models or validate the candidate taxonomy.
